creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 155482
ports patch8

Fix build errors:
- chinese/cconv: set CONFIGURE_ENV instead of MAKE_ENV
- java/sablevm-classpath: caused by a problem in java/jikes
- textproc/py-pyctpp2: caused by a problem in textproc/ctpp2
- www/anyterm: caused by a problem in USES=iconv, CPPFLAGS wasn't defined correctly in patch phase
- www/mod_encoding: old configure script, add variables to CONFIGURE_ENV instead of CONFIGURE_ARGS

incremental builds should be enough
